headline: NYSE Content Update: Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro Rings Bell Ahead of Upfront Event
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.

headline: A Look At Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Valuation As IRM 2 Extends To ERCOT Power Markets
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) extended its IRM 2 Value at Risk margining model to U.S. ERCOT power markets. The move tightens risk controls around Texas electricity contracts and builds on growing power derivatives activity. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange. Recent product launches in ERCOT power, stronger first quarter results and a higher quarterly dividend have come alongside a 1-year total shareholder return that declined 7.94%, while the 5-year total shareholder...
